📋 Required Column Format
NameREQMedicine name
CompanyREQCompany / brand name

Schemee.g. 10+1 Free
StockYes / No (default: Yes)

Mic blocked in WhatsApp
WhatsApp's browser doesn't allow microphone access.
Open the file in Chrome to use voice search.
HOW TO OPEN IN CHROME
1️⃣ Tap ⋮ Menu (top right)
2️⃣ Tap "Open in Chrome"
3️⃣ 🎤 Voice search will work!
